Features

  • Fast. Powerful. AI-ready.

    Reimagine what’s possible with Galaxy S26 Series, featuring our most powerful processor yet. Effortlessly stay connected with context-aware reply suggestions,¹ open and switch between apps and fine-tune photos and videos without skipping a beat.

  • Strong performance. Smooth play

    Push the boundaries of what’s possible in mobile gaming, thanks to our most powerful processor yet. Play graphic-intensive games with lightning-fast responsiveness and top the leaderboard with Galaxy S26 Series.

  • Remove the mess. Restore the magic

    Quickly transform your photos by simply typing or tapping using Photo Assist² with Galaxy AI.³ Did someone take a bite of your dessert before you took the photo? Just type, “Make this piece of cake look perfect,” and your pic is fixed like magic.

  • Want to add in a few plates or cups to elevate the scene? Pull objects from Samsung Gallery, and they’ll naturally blend in with the scene’s lighting and shadows. You can even apply AI-generated styles to give your photo a totally different vibe.

  • Make it. Edit it. Share it.

    Meet your new creative outlet. From playful illustrations to 3D cartoons, add fun to your everyday moments —whether it’s a custom wallpaper, stickers for your group chat, a special contact photo or an invitation.⁴ ³

  • Smart suggestions. Brilliant timing.

    Now Nudge with Galaxy AI³ is your behind-the-scenes assistant that just gets you. When you need to reply¹ to a text, search for info or fill out an online form, Now Nudge uses your screen cues to pull up information⁵ saved on your phone, right when you need it. That means quicker replies, fewer frantic app switches and more moments that feel like you’re running your day —and not the other way around.

  • Richer color. Sharper detail.

    Get into your favorite content like never before. Your screen automatically enhances streaming and social content for richer colors and sharper details you can enjoy clearly. And with scrolling and transitions designed to be smooth, your screen experience becomes even more immersive.

  • Group selfies made easy

    Group selfies shouldn’t take so much effort. With a wider⁷ front camera, it’s easier to capture more people and more of the scene in one simple shot.

  • Hi-Res Audio. Hands-free AI.

    Say hello to the unbeatable duo. Galaxy S26+ and Buds4 Pro⁸ work together as one seamless experience, bringing AI assistance³ right to your ears so you can stay hands-free. Hear messages or get quick answers while getting errands done —all without unlocking your phone. It’s a smarter way to stay in control, whether you’re navigating your day, multitasking on the move or simply trying to stay in the moment.

  • A digital wallet is already in your Galaxy

    Say goodbye to bulky wallets and hello to Samsung Wallet on your Galaxy S26 Series. Securely store and access your debit and credit cards,⁹ loyalty cards, boarding passes¹⁰ and more right from your phone. Check out the Samsung Wallet app in your phone to learn about all the features available and start using it today.
